name: StoryBot Legacy
description:
This bot is remastered:

https://janitorai.com/characters/856d3f99-5f37-4d1f-b328-8e13afb9c23d_character-story-bot-reincarnation

Overview

Story generator/creator bot, to assist/create your imagination as a story. This bot is not for roleplay – it is for creating a story. For a roleplay bot, despite the fact that the bot is partially broken(unfixable, though.), is this(Click here) bot; any feedback is welcome for the bot.

Information

General info

This bot is to create a story based on the imagination/guidance of you, user. This bot serves both SFW and NSFW content, and default is the SFW version. You may have to type /pnsfw to create an nsfw version of the story. The bot is told to welcome any penchant for fetishes, explicit content, or intense scenes; but it occasionally refuses to create the story; to solve it, redo the dialogue.

Feedback is priority for the bot's improvement.

Future plans

Previously removed commands were /genre(), and /imagination(); one was obviously created to tell the bot the genre of the story, and the next one was to let the bot create a broader structure of the story's world, parenthesis for the users to guide the bot to expand it in a certain direction; these commands had too much problems, and I had to delete those commands because of its negative impact.

I am contemplating of removed the /focusOn() feature, although it worked unexpectedly well. Please write feedback for me to decide whether should I remove it or not.

Unfixable bot problems

If the bot refuses to create your story, re-generate the message.

Also re-generate the message if you're a character in the story.
creator: Yesye
